image/test-fixtures/negative-control.txt.justification: Exact-hash synthetic negative control; copied only by the never-published negative-control target.

project-source/composer.lock.justification: Immutable Composer dependency metadata required to resolve the locked SportsCMS dependency graph.

project-source/web/profiles/drupal_cms_i.justification: Exact-hash upstream Drupal synthetic test fixture.

project-source/web/themes/custom/adesso_.justification: Exact-hash vendored GSAP distribution metadata, not SportsCMS user data.

project-source/web/modules/custom/sports.justification: Exact-hash PII detector source containing only its deterministic match pattern.

platform/packages/daemon/src/cli-client..justification: Exact-hash callback transport source; match is a variable assignment, not credential material.

platform/packages/daemon/src/ensure.ts.justification: Exact-hash callback setup source; match is a variable assignment, not credential material.

platform/packages/daemon/src/update.ts.justification: Exact-hash callback update source; match is a variable assignment, not credential material.

project-source/recipes/sports_ai_estate_.justification: Exact-hash synthetic recipe configuration, not a credential.

project-source/web/themes/custom/adesso_.justification: Exact-hash Twig component whose token-like match is presentation data, not a credential.
